summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Building Culture cinematic landing. 10/10 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend renders all 10 sections, ecosystem fetches 8 cards from /api/ecosystem with correct beta/live/coming-soon badges, nav scroll-anchors work, waitlist submits successfully and shows success state, hero CTAs and images load, mobile menu opens with all anchors. Minor data-testid naming deviations noted; everything functions correctly.
action_items: Minor: PRD specified mobile menu testid as 'mobile-menu'; implementation uses 'nav-menu-toggle'. Functional, but consider aligning naming.
Minor: Mobile menu items don't carry data-testid='nav-link-*' (those exist on desktop nav only). Add for symmetry if mobile automation is desired.

Minor: Invalid email submission relies solely on browser HTML5 validation; no explicit data-testid='waitlist-error' element is rendered. PRD lists 'waitlist-error' as a testid — consider rendering an inline error message for clearer UX.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean, async, /api prefix, MongoDB _id excluded via projection — looks good.
Waitlist endpoint correctly idempotent on email (verified by pytest).
Analytics endpoint stores IP/UA — fine for a landing page; consider GDPR note later.
Stats values communities_seeded=12 and properties_in_pipeline=47 are intentionally static (documented as mocked).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ waitlist entries via pytest; safe to leave (idempotent design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py covers health, ecosystem, waitlist (create+idempotent+invalid+count), analytics, stats. All passed. Frontend renders correctly on desktop (1920) and mobile (390). Public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Mobile menu uses data-testid='nav-menu-toggle' not 'mobile-menu'.
